offer: For property managers processing 5–15 rental inspections/month, manual tracking causes missed deadlines, leading to tenant dissatisfaction. We automate inspections instead of spreadsheets and manual checklists.
problem: manual tracking of inspections leads to missed deadlines and tenant dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try simple inspection scheduling and checklist creation for inspections on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
